detectors.description:

	- Getters.getCurrentGuardianSetIndex() (contracts/Getters.sol#13-15)
	- Getters.getGuardianSetExpiry() (contracts/Getters.sol#17-19)
	- Getters.governanceActionIsConsumed(bytes32) (contracts/Getters.sol#21-23)
	- Getters.isInitialized(address) (contracts/Getters.sol#25-27)
	- Getters.chainId() (contracts/Getters.sol#29-31)
	- Getters.evmChainId() (contracts/Getters.sol#33-35)
	- Getters.governanceChainId() (contracts/Getters.sol#41-43)
	- Getters.governanceContract() (contracts/Getters.sol#45-47)
	- Getters.messageFee() (contracts/Getters.sol#49-51)
	- Getters.nextSequence(address) (contracts/Getters.sol#53-55)

detectors.description:
Messages.verifyVMInternal(Structs.VM,bool) (contracts/Messages.sol#40-102) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- vm.guardianSetIndex != getCurrentGuardianSetIndex() && guardianSet.expirationTime < block.timestamp (contracts/Messages.sol#80)
detectors.markdown:

detectors.description:

	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching.
It is used by:

	- ^0.8.0 (contracts/Messages.sol#4)
	- ^0.8.0 (contracts/State.sol#4)
	- ^0.8.0 (contracts/Structs.sol#4)
